parentQuestion: The dorsal body cavity contains the ___.

scaffolds.explain: Dorsal means back or posterior. In humans standing upright, dorsal structures are on your back side. Think: dorsal fin on a shark — it's on the back/top. Simple, elegant, precise.

scaffolds.q: The brain and spinal cord together form the ___.
scaffolds.explain: The brain and spinal cord together form the central nervous system (CNS) — your body's command-and-control center. Everything else (nerves branching to your limbs and organs) is the peripheral nervous system. Beautiful hierarchy, isn't it?
